name: Mario Kart 64
description: The definitive party racing game. Race mode or balloon battle — everyone knows this one.

p1_laps.notes: P1 laps completed (hi word) + laps to race (lo word). Source: libretro cheat13 (81164390)

p1_balloons.notes: P1 balloons (battle mode). Source: libretro cheat21 (8118D8C0)

tournament_modes.name: Balloon Battle
tournament_modes.description: Last player with balloons wins. Start with 3 balloons each — lose all = eliminated.

tournament_modes.name: Grand Prix Race
tournament_modes.description: First to complete all laps wins. Track lap completion via lap address.

recommended_settings.course: Any — Toad's Turnpike or Rainbow Road for chaos

notes: N64 GameShark codes use format 8XXXXXXX YYYY — address is 0xXXXXXX, value is 0xYYYY
Balloon battle is the best tournament format — fast, chaotic, unambiguous winner
Lap addresses need live verification — exact byte offset for 'laps completed' within the word TBD
mupen64plus_next is recommended accurate N64 core
⚠️ Verify balloon and lap addresses with RetroArch memory viewer on first run
Everyone has played this — maximum buy-in from players
